name: Plush Security Blanket - Planet - Cloud Island™
description:
This Small Security Blanket from Cloud Island™ is a cute, cuddly pick for your little one. Made from a soft fabric, this cuddly blanket is designed in a rust hue with satin trim and topped with a plush smiling planet accent to captivate your baby's attention. A perfect addition for car rides, strollers, walks or travels, this security blanket makes a cuddly companion at home or on the go.

Cloud Island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
